rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. LATIA THOMPSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 10, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal. GRANTED for attorney mistake under CCP 473(b). The dismissal is vacated. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. JEAN-FRANCOIS FRIOCOURT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 10, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT JEAN-FRANCOIS FRIOCOURT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain their burden under CCP 473(b). Judgment was entered at 10:45 a.m. on December 12, 2016. Department 509 is not a courtroom. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. EPIPHANY ROSS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing To Determine The Rental Value And The Payment To Cover Daily Damages Pending Appeal (Per 1/4/17 Order)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 10, 2017, line 5. Hearing To Determine The Rental Value And The Payment To Cover Daily Damages Pending Appeal. Daily damages are set at $8.34 per day. Defendants must post with the Court no later than January 13, 2017 $250.14. Defendant shall post $250.14 on of before the first day of the month pending appeal. If the amount of subsidy changes for any reason, Plaintiff or Defendant may appear ex-parte to determine the value. =(501/REQ)
